context: W5.0 byte-inert regression. W5.0 landed WS-codec machinery (emit_ws_envelope + 3 generators + 3 extraction arms + pinned-id in render_envelope_v3) as ADDITIVE DORMANT code — nothing calls it yet, legacy WS dispatch untouched. The ONLY behavioral touch is pinned-id in render_envelope_v3 (used solely by copilot_chat_send). Expectation: EVERY service's verdict must be IDENTICAL to its W4+W6 baseline (#1256-1276). Any difference = a non-inert regression to investigate.
notes: you 차단=url_query_blocked: PII를 SEARCH/CHAT 쿼리로 제출해 you.com이 GET query string으로 라우팅하게 한 뒤(엔진 url_query_blocked 발화 확인), 5분 내 hard-reload하여 Option C V6-F page-replacement가 여전히 발화하는지 확인.
